title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Zostel - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Zostel - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Zostel invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Digital Marketing Manager at our Pimpri-Chinchwad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Zostel:
Zostel is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Life and accident insurance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zostel!
